channel.title: Gaming on Have an average day :|
channel.description: Recent content in Gaming on Have an average day :|

item.title: 0ad is coming together nicely!
item.description: I love a good RTS. Sadly there hasn’t been any in a very long time. Everyone who makes an RTS tries to do it differently and keeps adding things that completely ruin the mechanics. Case in point anything past Supreme Commander 2 and Red-Alert 2. Now 0AD feels and looks like the RTS games I feel in love with. They just released Alpha 13 and I can’t wait to play it.

item.title: Poking fun at Linux Gaming
item.description: So I see this post on Reddit and thought it was pretty funny. I didn’t laugh till I saw the top comment though. AbaddonSF: This must be the Ubuntu version, Slack or gentoo, would be a log, and some copper ore. Hypersapien: A log? Pfft. You want all the work done for you? Try an acorn. You’ll need iron ore and coal as well to make the steel tools to cut the tree down when it grows and shape the wood.

item.title: Valve on "Steam Box" rumors
item.description: So after reading Valve on “Steam Box” rumors: “long way from shipping any sort of hardware” This post (Meanwhile at Valve headquarters…) becomes even more relevent. I’m excited and my wallet is scared. ![](https://i2.wp.com/www.thehijax.com/wp-content/uploads/2012/11/HATBU.jpg?resize=621%2C3278 "SteamBox?")TAKE IT ALL!

item.title: Double Fine Happy Action Theater redefines what a Kinect "game" can be
item.description: Now this looks like a fun game to play with the kids. THE FLOOR IS HOT LAVA! – Double Fine Happy Action Theater redefines what a Kinect “game” can be.

item.title: Into the fires of hell I go... D3 Beta
item.description: It was nice knowing you world… but I gotta beta to play.
